THETREASURER-STEAL.title: Steal
THETREASURER-STEAL.description: #Deal !D! damage. Gain Gold equal to damage dealt.
THETREASURER-MONEY_EQUALS_POWER.title: Money = Power
THETREASURER-MONEY_EQUALS_POWER.descript: Gain 1 Energy at the start of your turn if Gold > 100.
THETREASURER-MUG.title: Mug
THETREASURER-MUG.description: #Deal !D! damage. Apply 2 Weak. If the enemy intends to attack, gain !GoldGain! Gold.
THETREASURER-ALLOWANCE.title: Allowance
THETREASURER-BRING_BACK.title: Bring Back
THETREASURER-BRING_BACK.description: #Choose a card in your discard pile. Add it to your hand and enchant it with Spiral 1 this combat.
THETREASURER-TREASURE.title: Treasure
THETREASURER-TREASURE.description: Create a random resin Relic of any rarity.
THETREASURER-CREAM.title: C.R.E.A.M
THETREASURER-STRIKE_TREASURER.title: Strike
THETREASURER-DEFEND_TREASURER.title: Defend
THETREASURER-COWER.title: Cower
THETREASURER-COWER.description: #Gain !B! Block. Apply 1 Weak to all enemies.
THETREASURER-CAPTIVATE.title: Captivate
THETREASURER-CAPTIVATE.description: #Deal !D! damage. If this card is enchanted, gain !B! Block.
THETREASURER-CHECK_SATCHEL.title: Check Satchel
THETREASURER-CHINA_BULL.title: China Bull
THETREASURER-CHINA_BULL.description: #Deal !D! damage. Destroy a random resin Relic.
